subject: Hatenna, a small round pink Pokemon in a flower-filled outdoor garden setting
description: A small, round, pink Pokemon with a prominent drooping protrusion on its head sits quietly among lush green plants and soft pastel flowers. Its body is smooth and compact with no visible limbs, and it appears nearly motionless among the vegetation. The background is a soft, bright green garden scene with flowering plants rendered in warm pastel tones. The mood is serene and gentle, in keeping with the creature's flavor-text emphasis on calm.
foreground: small round pink Pokemon among green plants and flowers
background: soft pastel garden with flowering plants
